original: Longest known frozen embryo to be successfully born is delivered in Tennessee - Emma Wren Gibson, frozen 24 years ago
Dead and buried mink reported rising from the ground due to bloating, after a hurried cull of millions of COVID-19 infected animals in Denmark

David Steed balanced stationary on a bike for 9 hrs 15 mins

Race segregation forbidden on trains & buses between US states

Peter Jackson's documentary series "The Beatles: Get Back" premieres on Disney+

'The White Ship' capsizes near the Normandy coast while crossing the English Channel transporting many nobles, including the heir to the English throne, from France to England; about 300 die, only 1 survivor

Ito, Japan records 690 earthquake shocks in 1 day
Minneapolis Thanksgiving Day Fire destroys an entire city block, including the Northwestern National Bank building and the recently closed Donaldson's Department Store

Amy Grant, American gospel and rock singer ("Glory of Love"; "Baby Baby"), born in Augusta, Georgia

US cuts maximum speed limit cut to 55 MPH as an energy conservation measure
Widespread earthquake hits North East US, Canada, no damage reported
Sudden violent storms strike southern Sri Lanka, drowning many fishermen caught by surprise and killing 27 people. Landslides and flooding hit the mainland, and thousands of homes lose their roofs.

Percy Sledge, American soul singer ("When A Man Loves A Woman"; "Take Time to Know Her"), born in Leighton, Alabama (d. 2015)

Tim Armstrong, American singer and guitarist (Rancid;  The Transplants), born in Albany, California

India bowl the Sri Lankan cricket team out for 82; Venkatapathy Raju (I) takes 6-12 off 17.5 overs
